pageSubtitle: Pick an account to add a trade, or manage your accounts.
confirmClear: Delete all trades on account {name}? This cannot be undone.
lastAccountNote: This is your only active account, so a new empty generic account will be created automatically to replace it.
confirmArchiveLast: Archive {name}? Its trades will be hidden from your dashboard and stats until you restore it.

transfer.title: Transfer data
transfer.description: Move all trades from {name} ({count}) to another account.
transfer.noTargets: No other account available. Create another account first.
